hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' /dev/stdin); case "$file" in *.py) "$HOME/.local/bin/ruff" check --fix "$file"; "$HOME/.local/bin/ruff" format "$file";; *.sql) "$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims/sqlfluff" fix --force "$file";; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.jsonc|*.css|*.scss|*.html|*.md|*.yaml|*.yml) "$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims/prettier" --write --ignore-unknown "$file";; esac
